tracks.meaning: the length of time that a person or thing has existed, measured in years
to grow older or to cause something to appear older
the process of growing older and showing signs of aging such as wrinkles or gray hair
a geological time period or epoch in Earth's history
a long period of time, as in 'I haven't seen you in ages'
the legal status of being old enough to be considered an adult with full legal rights
the process of chemical change or deterioration that occurs in materials over time
the maturation period during which wine develops flavor and complexity in storage
the period that meat or other food is allowed to mature or cure to improve flavor
advancing years of life measured in chronological time used in medical assessment
